steps.title: Find the real subject
steps.content: The subject is the plural noun phrase "Barrada's pieces." The long phrase beginning with "utilizing" only modifies those pieces and does not change the subject-verb agreement.

steps.title: Choose a plural finite verb
steps.content: A and C are singular verb forms, and D is a participle that would leave the sentence without a main verb. The blank needs a finite plural verb that agrees with "pieces." The answer is B.
